summary: Comprehensive testing of The Gig Pulse PWA UI updates completed. All requested features verified working correctly: ribbon icon for Arena, 2x2 grid, Earnings Tracker in Arena section, Driver Wins card layout with username below date and fire badge on right, fire system starting at 0, Shift Complete badge support.
passed_tests: Home page: 2x2 grid at top with 4 navigation cards (Curated Videos, News Feed, Driver Essentials, Apps & Tools)
Home page: The Arena section shows ribbon icon next to title
Home page: The Arena section has 3 cards: Live Pulse, Driver Wins, Earnings Tracker
Bottom tab bar: Shows ribbon icon for Arena tab
Driver Wins: Feed loads correctly with trip cards
Driver Wins: Cards show username below date stamp (e.g., 'Sat Feb 14, 4:51PM' then '@ShiftTracker')
Driver Wins: Fire badge displayed on the right side of cards
Driver Wins: New posts start with 0 fires (verified in API response and UI)
Driver Wins: Fire tiers display correctly (🔥 for 0-1, 🔥🔥 for 2-4, 🔥🔥🔥 for 5-9, 🔥🔥🔥🔥 for 10+)
Driver Wins: 'Shift Complete' badge shows on shift summary posts
Driver Wins: 'Tip Updated' badge shows on updated posts
Earnings Tracker: Page loads with Start Shift button when no active shift
Earnings Tracker: Start Shift creates active shift with timer and $0.00 total
Earnings Tracker: Add Trip button visible after starting shift
Earnings Tracker: Add Trip modal opens with Platform, Base $, Tip $, Total $, Miles, Minutes, Note fields
Earnings Tracker: Platform options include Uber, Lyft, DoorDash, UberEats, Instacart, Spark, Amazon Flex, Grubhub, Shipt, Other
Earnings Tracker: End Shift button visible for posting to Driver Wins
Live Pulse: Page shows 'Live Now' section
Live Pulse: Page shows 'Upcoming Competitions' section
Live Pulse: Streamer CTA section visible with 'Create Session' button
Arena page: Shows 'Choose Your Arena' header with ribbon icon
Arena page: Shows all 3 options (Live Pulse, Driver Wins, Earnings Tracker)
Arena page: LIVE NOW badge on Live Pulse option
Arena page: REAL-TIME badge on Driver Wins option
Arena page: LIVE TRACKING badge on Earnings Tracker option
seed_data_creation: Test shifts created during Earnings Tracker testing (stored in localStorage)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI updates verified working: ribbon icon for Arena (instead of fire/fitness icon), Earnings Tracker added as 3rd row in Arena section, Driver Wins cards show username below date stamp with fire badge on right, fire system starts at 0 with correct tier display, Shift Complete badge support working. PWA install prompt may appear and can be dismissed with 'Maybe Later'.

features_verified.ribbon_icon: Verified - ribbon icon shows in Arena section title, bottom tab bar, and Arena page header
features_verified.2x2_grid: Verified - 4 navigation cards displayed in 2x2 grid at top of home page
features_verified.earnings_tracker: Verified - Added as 3rd row in Arena section with full functionality (Start Shift, Add Trip, End Shift)
features_verified.driver_wins_layout: Verified - Username below date stamp, fire badge on right side of cards
features_verified.fire_system: Verified - New posts start with 0 fires, tiers display correctly (🔥, 🔥🔥, 🔥🔥🔥, 🔥🔥🔥🔥)
features_verified.shift_complete_badge: Verified - Shows on shift summary posts in Driver Wins feed
